endpoints.name: Gets author details
endpoints.description: Returns the name and a list of books by the author.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Search authors
endpoints.description: This returns a list of authors whos name matches the given query
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{QUERY}} with a real query.

endpoints.name: Gets book details
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{ISBN}} with a real isbn.

endpoints.name: Search books
endpoints.description: This returns a list of books that match the query
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{QUERY}} with a real query.

endpoints.name: Gets publisher details
endpoints.description: Returns details and a list of books by the publisher.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Search publishers
endpoints.description: This returns a list of publishers that match the given query
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{QUERY}} with a real query.

endpoints.name: Search all ISBNDB databases
endpoints.description: Uses a free query string compatible with ElasticSearch 6 to search in any of the ISBNDB's databases
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY.

endpoints.name: Gets status on the ISBNDB Database
endpoints.description: Returns a status object about the ISBNDB database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY.

endpoints.name: Gets subject details
endpoints.description: Returns details and a list of books with subject.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Search subjects
endpoints.description: This returns a list of subjects that match the given query
endpoints.notes: Replace {{ISBNDB_API_KEY}} with your ISBNDB API KEY. Replace {{QUERY}} with a real query.
